Title: Rotation
Description: Applies a rotation to an operation

Options.Label: Rotation Axis
Options.Description: The axis to rotate the operation(s) around.

Options.Label: Rotation Angle
Options.Description: The angle to rotate the operation(s) around.

Options.Label: Origin of Rotation
Options.Description:
The origin of rotation.

ClickCenter will rotate the operation(s) around where the brush was clicked at (around itself).

OffsetCenter will rotate the operation(s) around where the current offset is at.

Player will rotate the operation(s) around the player's position.

Example:
If I wanted a cylinder to be rotated based on where I clicked, I would use ClickCenter (rotates around a center point).
If I wanted a cylinder to be on its side at an offset I give, I would use Offset Center (rotates around itself).
